text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The time has come for a 1,600-meter race—the
Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's only thanks to my blood, sweat, and tears that
I've gotten this far.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
After that, I'm heading for 2,000 meters, and
then 2,500 meters... reaching the apex of the
Bakushin Road with more distance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to take my first big step—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm still taking my first step... as a senior racer?
This is my senior year, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't think this is what the Bakushin Road
means at—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
choice_data_list: Let's win and make you into the Mightiest Miler!
Let's win and make you into the Mightiest Miler!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Got it! All aboard the Bakushin Boat and full
steam ahead!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you what three years' worth of hard work
can do!
